title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at National Insurance

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at National Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, National Insurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About National Insurance:
National Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance!
